    base:desc "Physical system components generating data for digital twin"

]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration of heterogeneous modeling notations (SysML, ACME, AADL, MontiArc, SysML IBDs) and tools (Simulink, C++, Java) to address stakeholder perspectives and component & connector interactions as part of Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) practices."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with industry standards including SysML [17] for model-based systems engineering, AADL [24] as an architecture description language standard, ACME [23] for component-based architecture descriptions, MontiArc [25], [26] for architectural modeling, and methodologies such as RFLP [18], [19], OOSEM [20], SPES [21], and SMArDT [22] for structured system development across abstraction levels."
]
